name: Rhubarb and Raspberry Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pie dough into a 10-inch tart or pie pan.
2. Cut rhubarb into 1/4 inch pieces, distribute evenly in the tart shell, then sprinkle with raspberries.
3. Combine sugar, eggs, and egg yolk in a mixing bowl; whisk ingredients together until smooth.
4. Add cream and vanilla, and mix until well combined.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the fruit and bake in a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the tart batter is firm. Turn off the heat and allow the tart to cool before serving.
